``` ### `frontend/wiki-styles.css` #### Logo Link Styling ```css .logo { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; text-decoration: none; /* No underline */ color: inherit; /* Inherit text color */ cursor: pointer; /* Pointer cursor */ } .logo:hover .logo-icon { transform: scale(1.05); /* Icon grows on hover */ } ``` #### Home Button Styling **Matches the main site navigation links:** ```css .home-btn { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.875rem; background: transparent; /* Transparent by default */ color: var(--text-secondary); /* Secondary text color */ text-decoration: none; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); font-size: 0.9375rem; /* Matches nav-link font size */ font-weight: 500; transition: all var(--transition); border: none; } .home-btn:hover { color: var(--text-primary); /* Primary text on hover */ background: var(--bg-secondary); /* Subtle background highlight */ } .home-btn:active { transform: scale(0.95); /* Subtle press effect */ } ``` #### Mobile Responsive ```css @media (max-width: 768px) { .home-btn span { display: none; /* Hide "Home" text on mobile */ } .home-btn { padding: 0.5rem; width: 40px; height: 40px; justify-content: center; /* Show icon only */ } } ``` ## Behavior **On the wiki page (http://localhost:3000/wiki):** ### Desktop View: - ✅ **Logo (left)** — Clickable icon + title, icon scales on hover - ✅ **Home button (right)** — Shows house icon + "Home" text - ✅ **Hover effect** — Subtle background highlight (matches nav links) - ✅ **Consistent design** — Same style as main site navigation ### Mobile View: - ✅ **Home button** — Shows house icon only (text hidden) - ✅ **Compact layout** — Same size as other icon buttons ## Visual Design **Home Button States:** 1. **Default** — Transparent background, secondary text color (subtle) 2. **Hover** — Primary text color, subtle secondary background 3. **Active** — Slight scale-down press effect (0.95x) **Logo States:** 1. **Default** — Gradient text, icon shadow 2. **Hover** — Icon scales to 105%, maintains gradient **Design Consistency:** - Home button uses the **exact same styling** as nav links on the main site - Matches font size (0.9375rem), padding (0.5rem 0.875rem), and transition timing - Seamless visual integration with the rest of the interface ## Testing 1. **Open wiki:** http://localhost:3000/wiki 2. **Desktop:** - Hover over logo → icon scales - Hover over "Home" button → subtle highlight (matches nav links) - Click either → navigates to home 3. **Mobile (resize browser < 768px):** - Home button shows icon only - Still fully functional ## Files Modified - ✅ `frontend/wiki.html` (lines 26-36) - ✅ `frontend/wiki-styles.css` (lines 118-192, 1458-1470) --- **Status: FULLY IMPLEMENTED** - **2 ways** to navigate home (logo + button) - **Consistent design** (matches main site nav links perfectly) - **Responsive design** (works on all screen sizes) - **Smooth animations** (subtle hover highlight, scale press effect)

option.name: filePath
option.value: /config (snapshot).yml

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ ᴘʟᴜɢɪɴ · config.yml · v1.5.8 # Run /fpp reload to apply changes without restarting the server. # Colors use MiniMessage: <#0079FF>text</#0079FF> <gray>text</gray> # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Internal — managed by the migration system. Do NOT edit. config-version: 38 # Internal migration version — updated automatically. Do not edit.
language: en # Language file to use (language/<lang>.yml) debug: false # Legacy master switch: true = enable every debug category below
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # LOGGING / DEBUG # All toggles below are false by default so normal logs stay clean and user-friendly. # Set only the subsystem you want to inspect to true. # The top-level `debug: true` switch above still enables every category at once. # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── logging: debug: startup: false # Startup flow, reloads, compatibility, general lifecycle nms: false # Reflection, fake connection setup, NMS internals packets: false # Tab-list/entity packet sending and packet constructor selection luckperms: false # LuckPerms group sync and prefix refresh details network: false # Velocity/Bungee plugin messaging and remote bot sync config-sync: false # Network config push/pull activity and YAML sync internals skin: false # Reserved for skin subsystem debugging database: false # Database init, migrations, flushes, and session persistence
update-checker: enabled: true # Check for new versions on startup and /fpp reload
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # METRICS # Anonymous usage statistics sent to FastStats. Helps the developer understand # which features are used most. No personal data is ever collected. # Set false to opt out completely. # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── metrics: enabled: true
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # BOT LIMITS # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── limits: max-bots: 1000 # Global cap across all spawners. 0 = unlimited. user-bot-limit: 1 # Default personal limit for fpp.user.spawn players. spawn-presets: [1, 5, 10, 15, 20] # Tab-complete suggestions for /fpp spawn
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # SPAWN COOLDOWN # How many seconds a player must wait between /fpp spawn commands. # 0 = no cooldown. Admins with fpp.bypass.cooldown are always exempt. # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── spawn-cooldown: 0
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # BOT DISPLAY NAMES # Placeholders: {bot_name} {spawner} {num} # Colors: <#0079FF>{bot_name}</#0079FF> or <gray>{bot_name}</gray> # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── bot-name: admin-format: '{bot_name}' # /fpp spawn (admin) user-format: 'bot-{spawner}-{num}' # /fpp spawn (user tier)
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # LUCKPERMS INTEGRATION # Bots are now real NMS ServerPlayer entities. LuckPerms detects them as real # players and applies prefix, suffix, and tab-list ordering automatically. # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── luckperms: # Optional: assign this LP group to every new bot at spawn time. # When blank, bots receive LuckPerms' built-in "default" group. # Use "/fpp rank <bot> <group>" to change individual bot groups. default-group: ""
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # SKIN # # mode: auto — Mojang skin matching the bot's name. Best for online-mode. # Bots with generated names appear as default Steve / Alex. # mode: custom — Full control: per-bot overrides, pool, and skins/ folder. # mode: off — No skin. All bots use default Steve / Alex appearance. # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── skin: mode: auto guaranteed-skin: false # false = bots with no Mojang account use default Steve / Alex clear-cache-on-reload: true
# ── custom mode only ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── overrides: {} # Per-bot skin override: bot-name: minecraft-username pool: [] # Random skin pool — list of Minecraft usernames use-skin-folder: true # Scan plugins/FakePlayerPlugin/skins/ for PNG files
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # BOT BODY # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── body: enabled: true # false = tab-list / server-count only, no visible entity pushable: true # true = players/bots can push the body; false = body is immovable damageable: true # true = body takes damage and can die; false = body is invulnerable
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # PERSISTENCE # Bots leave on server shutdown and rejoin at their last position on restart. # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── persistence: enabled: true
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # JOIN / LEAVE TIMING # Values are in TICKS. 20 ticks = 1 second. # Each bot joins/leaves after a random tick delay in this range. # Examples: 0 = instant 20 = 1 s 40 = 2 s 100 = 5 s # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── join-delay: min: 0 max: 1
leave-delay: min: 0 max: 1
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # MESSAGES # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── messages: join-message: true # "<Name> joined the game" — vanilla-style broadcast leave-message: true # "<Name> left the game" kill-message: false # Broadcast when a real player kills a bot # When true any compatibility warnings (version/API checks) are sent to # server operators and players with admin permission when they join. notify-admins-on-join: true
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # COMBAT # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── combat: max-health: 20.0 # Bot HP (20.0 = standard player health, 2 HP = 1 heart) hurt-sound: true # Play the player hurt sound when a bot takes damage
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # DEATH & RESPAWN # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── death: respawn-on-death: false # Respawn the bot after death instead of removing it respawn-delay: 60 # Ticks before respawn (60 = 3 seconds) suppress-drops: true # Prevent bots from dropping items on death
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # CHUNK LOADING # Bots keep surrounding chunks loaded exactly like a real player. # Mobs spawn, redstone ticks, crops grow inside the loaded radius. # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── chunk-loading: enabled: true radius: 0 # Chunk radius kept loaded. 0 = match server simulation-distance. update-interval: 20 # Ticks between position checks (20 = 1 s). Lower = more responsive.
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # HEAD AI # Bots smoothly rotate to look at the nearest player within range. # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── head-ai: enabled: true look-range: 8.0 # Detection radius in blocks turn-speed: 0.3 # Rotation smoothing (0.0 = frozen, 1.0 = instant snap)
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # SWIM AI # Bots automatically swim upward when submerged in water or lava, mimicking # a real player holding the spacebar / jump key. Disable to let bots sink. # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── swim-ai: enabled: true # Set false to let bots sink/drown instead of swimming up
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # COLLISION & PUSH · Advanced — defaults work well for most servers. # Controls how hard players/hits push bots, and how bots separate from each other. # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── collision: walk-radius: 0.85 # Radius in which walking into a bot pushes it walk-strength: 0.22 # Push force when walking into a bot hit-strength: 0.45 # Knockback force when hitting a bot (regular hit) hit-max-horizontal-speed: 0.80 # Max horizontal speed for hit/explosion knockback bot-radius: 0.90 # Radius for bot-vs-bot separation bot-strength: 0.14 # Separation force between two bots max-horizontal-speed: 0.30 # Maximum push speed cap for walk/separation sources
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # BOT SWAP / ROTATION # Bots automatically leave and rejoin with a new name to simulate real turnover. # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── swap: enabled: false session-min: 120 # Min seconds a bot stays online before swapping session-max: 600 # Max seconds
# Advanced options — fine-tune realism (leave at defaults for most servers) rejoin-delay-min: 5 # Min seconds between leave and rejoin rejoin-delay-max: 45 # Max seconds jitter: 30 # ± seconds added randomly to session timer reconnect-chance: 0.15 # Chance (0.0–1.0) to rejoin with the same name afk-kick-chance: 5 # % chance the rejoin gap is extended (AFK-kick sim) farewell-chat: true # Bot sends a farewell message before leaving greeting-chat: true # Bot sends a greeting message after rejoining require-player-online: true # Only send farewell/greeting when a real player is online time-of-day-bias: true # Longer sessions during peak hours
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # BOT CHAT # Bots send random messages from bot-messages.yml at random intervals. # Each local bot calls Player.chat() so the message routes through the # server's real chat pipeline — EssentialsChat, VentureChat, etc. format it # exactly as if a real player typed it. Chat events fire normally. # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── fake-chat: enabled: false require-player-online: true # Only chat when at least one real player is online chance: 0.75 # Probability (0.0–1.0) a message fires each interval interval: min: 5 # Seconds between messages (min) max: 10 # Seconds between messages (max) # Fallback format used ONLY for: # • Bodyless bots (console-spawned without a world location) # • Remote bots forwarded from other proxy servers (no player entity exists here) # Local bots with a physical body ignore this — your chat plugin controls their format. # Placeholders: {bot_name} — bot display name # {message} — text drawn from bot-messages.yml chat-format: "<{bot_name}> {message}"
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # TAB LIST # Controls whether bots appear as entries in the player tab list. # true = bots show in the tab list (default) # false = bots are invisible in the tab list (server-count still counts them) # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── tab-list: enabled: true
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # DATABASE & PROXY / NETWORK SUPPORT (Velocity · BungeeCord · Waterfall) # # Records every bot session for auditing and in-game queries (/fpp info). # SQLite: zero-config — stored at plugins/FakePlayerPlugin/data/fpp.db # MySQL: required for multi-server / proxy setups # # ── Modes ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # mode: LOCAL — single server (default). SQLite or MySQL, no server filtering. # mode: NETWORK — shared MySQL across multiple backend servers. # Each server tags its DB rows with server-id so bots stay # isolated per-server even on a shared database. # # ── Cross-server features enabled in NETWORK mode ──────────────────────────── # • Fake chat — broadcasts to every server on the proxy # • Alerts — /fpp alert reaches all servers instantly # • Join/leave — messages visible network-wide # • Isolation — bots only exist on the server that spawned them # # ── Quick proxy setup ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # 1. Set mode: "NETWORK" # 2. Give each backend server a unique server-id (e.g. "survival", "skyblock") # 3. Enable mysql-enabled and fill in credentials below # 4. For Velocity: set bungeecord-compat-mode: true in velocity.toml # 5. Run /fpp reload on every server # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # CONFIG SYNC # Cross-server configuration synchronization for network setups. # Only active when mode: NETWORK and database is enabled. # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── config-sync: # DISABLED - No config syncing (default) # MANUAL - Only sync via /fpp sync commands # AUTO_PULL - Pull latest config on startup/reload # AUTO_PUSH - Push config changes automatically mode: "DISABLED"
database: enabled: true # Master toggle: false = no DB operations, no persistence, no stats mode: "LOCAL" # LOCAL (single server) or NETWORK (proxy / multi-server)
# Unique name for THIS server — only matters when mode is NETWORK. # Every backend server must have a different value (e.g. "survival", "skyblock"). server-id: "default"
mysql-enabled: false mysql: host: "localhost" port: 3306 database: "fpp" username: "root" password: "" use-ssl: false pool-size: 5 connection-timeout: 30000
location-flush-interval: 30 # Seconds between position flushes to DB session-history: max-rows: 20 # Max rows returned per /fpp info query

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ ᴘʟᴜɢɪɴ · config.yml · v1.5.8 # Run /fpp reload to apply changes without restarting the server. # Colors use MiniMessage: <#0079FF>text</#0079FF> <gray>text</gray> # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Internal — managed by the migration system. Do NOT edit. config-version: 38 # Internal migration version — updated automatically. Do not edit.
language: en # Language file to use (language/<lang>.yml) debug: false # Legacy master switch: true = enable every debug category below
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # LOGGING / DEBUG # All toggles below are false by default so normal logs stay clean and user-friendly. # Set only the subsystem you want to inspect to true. # The top-level `debug: true` switch above still enables every category at once. # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── logging: debug: startup: false # Startup flow, reloads, compatibility, general lifecycle nms: false # Reflection, fake connection setup, NMS internals packets: false # Tab-list/entity packet sending and packet constructor selection luckperms: false # LuckPerms group sync and prefix refresh details network: false # Velocity/Bungee plugin messaging and remote bot sync config-sync: false # Network config push/pull activity and YAML sync internals skin: false # Reserved for skin subsystem debugging database: false # Database init, migrations, flushes, and session persistence
update-checker: enabled: true # Check for new versions on startup and /fpp reload
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # METRICS # Anonymous usage statistics sent to FastStats. Helps the developer understand # which features are used most. No personal data is ever collected. # Set false to opt out completely. # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── metrics: enabled: true
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # BOT LIMITS # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── limits: max-bots: 1000 # Global cap across all spawners. 0 = unlimited. user-bot-limit: 1 # Default personal limit for fpp.user.spawn players. spawn-presets: [1, 5, 10, 15, 20] # Tab-complete suggestions for /fpp spawn
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # SPAWN COOLDOWN # How many seconds a player must wait between /fpp spawn commands. # 0 = no cooldown. Admins with fpp.bypass.cooldown are always exempt. # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── spawn-cooldown: 0
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # BOT DISPLAY NAMES # Placeholders: {bot_name} {spawner} {num} # Colors: <#0079FF>{bot_name}</#0079FF> or <gray>{bot_name}</gray> # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── bot-name: admin-format: '{bot_name}' # /fpp spawn (admin) user-format: 'bot-{spawner}-{num}' # /fpp spawn (user tier)
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # LUCKPERMS INTEGRATION # Bots are now real NMS ServerPlayer entities. LuckPerms detects them as real # players and applies prefix, suffix, and tab-list ordering automatically. # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── luckperms: # Optional: assign this LP group to every new bot at spawn time. # When blank, bots receive LuckPerms' built-in "default" group. # Use "/fpp rank <bot> <group>" to change individual bot groups. default-group: ""
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # SKIN # # mode: auto — Mojang skin matching the bot's name. Best for online-mode. # Bots with generated names appear as default Steve / Alex. # mode: custom — Full control: per-bot overrides, pool, and skins/ folder. # mode: off — No skin. All bots use default Steve / Alex appearance. # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── skin: mode: auto guaranteed-skin: false # false = bots with no Mojang account use default Steve / Alex clear-cache-on-reload: true
# ── custom mode only ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── overrides: {} # Per-bot skin override: bot-name: minecraft-username pool: [] # Random skin pool — list of Minecraft usernames use-skin-folder: true # Scan plugins/FakePlayerPlugin/skins/ for PNG files
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # BOT BODY # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── body: enabled: true # false = tab-list / server-count only, no visible entity pushable: true # true = players/bots can push the body; false = body is immovable damageable: true # true = body takes damage and can die; false = body is invulnerable
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # PERSISTENCE # Bots leave on server shutdown and rejoin at their last position on restart. # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── persistence: enabled: true
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # JOIN / LEAVE TIMING # Values are in TICKS. 20 ticks = 1 second. # Each bot joins/leaves after a random tick delay in this range. # Examples: 0 = instant 20 = 1 s 40 = 2 s 100 = 5 s # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── join-delay: min: 0 max: 1
leave-delay: min: 0 max: 1
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # MESSAGES # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── messages: join-message: true # "<Name> joined the game" — vanilla-style broadcast leave-message: true # "<Name> left the game" kill-message: false # Broadcast when a real player kills a bot # When true any compatibility warnings (version/API checks) are sent to # server operators and players with admin permission when they join. notify-admins-on-join: true
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # COMBAT # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── combat: max-health: 20.0 # Bot HP (20.0 = standard player health, 2 HP = 1 heart) hurt-sound: true # Play the player hurt sound when a bot takes damage
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # DEATH & RESPAWN # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── death: respawn-on-death: false # Respawn the bot after death instead of removing it respawn-delay: 60 # Ticks before respawn (60 = 3 seconds) suppress-drops: true # Prevent bots from dropping items on death
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # CHUNK LOADING # Bots keep surrounding chunks loaded exactly like a real player. # Mobs spawn, redstone ticks, crops grow inside the loaded radius. # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── chunk-loading: enabled: true radius: 0 # Chunk radius kept loaded. 0 = match server simulation-distance. update-interval: 20 # Ticks between position checks (20 = 1 s). Lower = more responsive.
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # HEAD AI # Bots smoothly rotate to look at the nearest player within range. # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── head-ai: enabled: true look-range: 8.0 # Detection radius in blocks turn-speed: 0.3 # Rotation smoothing (0.0 = frozen, 1.0 = instant snap)
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # SWIM AI # Bots automatically swim upward when submerged in water or lava, mimicking # a real player holding the spacebar / jump key. Disable to let bots sink. # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── swim-ai: enabled: true # Set false to let bots sink/drown instead of swimming up
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # COLLISION & PUSH · Advanced — defaults work well for most servers. # Controls how hard players/hits push bots, and how bots separate from each other. # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── collision: walk-radius: 0.85 # Radius in which walking into a bot pushes it walk-strength: 0.22 # Push force when walking into a bot hit-strength: 0.45 # Knockback force when hitting a bot (regular hit) hit-max-horizontal-speed: 0.80 # Max horizontal speed for hit/explosion knockback bot-radius: 0.90 # Radius for bot-vs-bot separation bot-strength: 0.14 # Separation force between two bots max-horizontal-speed: 0.30 # Maximum push speed cap for walk/separation sources
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # BOT SWAP / ROTATION # Bots automatically leave and rejoin with a new name to simulate real turnover. # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── swap: enabled: false session-min: 120 # Min seconds a bot stays online before swapping session-max: 600 # Max seconds
# Advanced options — fine-tune realism (leave at defaults for most servers) rejoin-delay-min: 5 # Min seconds between leave and rejoin rejoin-delay-max: 45 # Max seconds jitter: 30 # ± seconds added randomly to session timer reconnect-chance: 0.15 # Chance (0.0–1.0) to rejoin with the same name afk-kick-chance: 5 # % chance the rejoin gap is extended (AFK-kick sim) farewell-chat: true # Bot sends a farewell message before leaving greeting-chat: true # Bot sends a greeting message after rejoining require-player-online: true # Only send farewell/greeting when a real player is online time-of-day-bias: true # Longer sessions during peak hours
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # BOT CHAT # Bots send random messages from bot-messages.yml at random intervals. # Each local bot calls Player.chat() so the message routes through the # server's real chat pipeline — EssentialsChat, VentureChat, etc. format it # exactly as if a real player typed it. Chat events fire normally. # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── fake-chat: enabled: false require-player-online: true # Only chat when at least one real player is online chance: 0.75 # Probability (0.0–1.0) a message fires each interval interval: min: 5 # Seconds between messages (min) max: 10 # Seconds between messages (max)
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # TAB LIST # Controls whether bots appear as entries in the player tab list. # true = bots show in the tab list (default) # false = bots are invisible in the tab list (server-count still counts them) # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── tab-list: enabled: true
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # DATABASE & PROXY / NETWORK SUPPORT (Velocity · BungeeCord · Waterfall) # # Records every bot session for auditing and in-game queries (/fpp info). # SQLite: zero-config — stored at plugins/FakePlayerPlugin/data/fpp.db # MySQL: required for multi-server / proxy setups # # ── Modes ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # mode: LOCAL — single server (default). SQLite or MySQL, no server filtering. # mode: NETWORK — shared MySQL across multiple backend servers. # Each server tags its DB rows with server-id so bots stay # isolated per-server even on a shared database. # # ── Cross-server features enabled in NETWORK mode ──────────────────────────── # • Fake chat — broadcasts to every server on the proxy # • Alerts — /fpp alert reaches all servers instantly # • Join/leave — messages visible network-wide # • Isolation — bots only exist on the server that spawned them # # ── Quick proxy setup ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # 1. Set mode: "NETWORK" # 2. Give each backend server a unique server-id (e.g. "survival", "skyblock") # 3. Enable mysql-enabled and fill in credentials below # 4. For Velocity: set bungeecord-compat-mode: true in velocity.toml # 5. Run /fpp reload on every server # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # CONFIG SYNC # Cross-server configuration synchronization for network setups. # Only active when mode: NETWORK and database is enabled. # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── config-sync: # DISABLED - No config syncing (default) # MANUAL - Only sync via /fpp sync commands # AUTO_PULL - Pull latest config on startup/reload # AUTO_PUSH - Push config changes automatically mode: "DISABLED"
database: enabled: true # Master toggle: false = no DB operations, no persistence, no stats mode: "LOCAL" # LOCAL (single server) or NETWORK (proxy / multi-server)
# Unique name for THIS server — only matters when mode is NETWORK. # Every backend server must have a different value (e.g. "survival", "skyblock"). server-id: "default"
mysql-enabled: false mysql: host: "localhost" port: 3306 database: "fpp" username: "root" password: "" use-ssl: false pool-size: 5 connection-timeout: 30000
location-flush-interval: 30 # Seconds between position flushes to DB session-history: max-rows: 20 # Max rows returned per /fpp info query

option.name: filePath
option.value: /en (snapshot).yml

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ ᴘʟᴜɢɪɴ · language/en.yml # English language file — edit and run /fpp reload to apply changes. # # Colour format : MiniMessage tags # Named colours : <red>, <gray>, <white>, <dark_gray>, <yellow> … # Hex colours : <#0079FF>text</#0079FF> # Decorations : <bold>, <italic>, <underlined>, <strikethrough> # Reset : <reset> # Placeholders : {placeholder} — see each entry for available ones # # ⚠ Keys marked "INTERNAL — do not edit" are used by the plugin's layout # engine. Changing them will break formatting. # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# ── Plugin prefix — prepended to all [FPP] messages ────────────────────────── # Feel free to change the colour/text, but keep it short. prefix: "<dark_gray>[<#0079FF>ꜰᴘᴘ</#0079FF><dark_gray>]<reset> "
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # INTERNAL LAYOUT STRINGS — do not remove or rename these keys. # You may adjust colours/characters but keep the structure intact. # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Horizontal rule used in headers and footers divider: "<dark_gray><st>━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━</st>"
# Help menu — INTERNAL (placeholders {cmd}, {args}, {desc} required) help-header: "<dark_gray><st>━━━━━━━━━</st> <#0079FF><bold>ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ ᴘʟᴜɢɪɴ</#0079FF> <dark_gray><st>━━━━━━━━━</st>" help-entry: " <#0079FF>/{cmd}</#0079FF><gray> {args} <dark_gray>— <white>{desc}" help-footer: "<dark_gray><st>━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━</st>"
# Plugin info screen (/fpp bare) — INTERNAL header line info-screen-header: " <#0079FF><bold>ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ ᴘʟᴜɢɪɴ</#0079FF> <dark_gray>· <gray>ꜰᴘᴘ"
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # PLAYER-FACING MESSAGES — safe to edit freely # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# ── Generic errors ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── no-permission: "{prefix}<red>ʏᴏᴜ ᴅᴏɴ'ᴛ ʜᴀᴠᴇ ᴘᴇʀᴍɪꜱꜱɪᴏɴ ᴛᴏ ᴅᴏ ᴛʜɪꜱ." unknown-command: "{prefix}<red>ᴜɴᴋɴᴏᴡɴ ꜱᴜʙ-ᴄᴏᴍᴍᴀɴᴅ. <gray>ᴛʀʏ <#0079FF>/{0} ʜᴇʟᴘ</#0079FF><gray> ꜰᴏʀ ᴀ ʟɪꜱᴛ." player-only: "{prefix}<red>ᴏɴʟʏ ᴀ ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ ᴄᴀɴ ʀᴜɴ ᴛʜɪꜱ ᴄᴏᴍᴍᴀɴᴅ." invalid-number: "{prefix}<red>ɪɴᴠᴀʟɪᴅ ɴᴜᴍʙᴇʀ. ᴘʟᴇᴀꜱᴇ ᴇɴᴛᴇʀ ᴀ ᴘᴏꜱɪᴛɪᴠᴇ ɪɴᴛᴇɢᴇʀ."
# ── Spawn ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # {count} — number of bots spawned # {total} — total bots now active # {name} — custom bot name (name-taken / invalid-name errors) # {max} — max bot limit (max-reached error) # {limit} — personal limit (user-limit-reached error) spawn-success: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{count}</#0079FF> <gray>ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ(ꜱ) <white>ꜱᴜᴍᴍᴏɴᴇᴅ<gray>. <dark_gray>(<#0079FF>{total}</#0079FF> <gray>ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ<dark_gray>)" spawn-max-reached: "{prefix}<red>ᴍᴀx ʙᴏᴛ ʟɪᴍɪᴛ ʀᴇᴀᴄʜᴇᴅ <dark_gray>(<#0079FF>{max}</#0079FF> <gray>ʙᴏᴛꜱ<dark_gray>)<red>. ᴅᴇʟᴇᴛᴇ ꜱᴏᴍᴇ ꜰɪʀꜱᴛ." spawn-user-limit-reached: "{prefix}<red>ʏᴏᴜ'ᴠᴇ ʀᴇᴀᴄʜᴇᴅ ʏᴏᴜʀ ᴘᴇʀꜱᴏɴᴀʟ ʙᴏᴛ ʟɪᴍɪᴛ <dark_gray>(<#0079FF>{limit}</#0079FF> <gray>ʙᴏᴛ(ꜱ)<dark_gray>)<red>." spawn-invalid: "{prefix}<red>ɪɴᴠᴀʟɪᴅ ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ. <gray>ᴛʀʏ <#0079FF>/fpp spawn [afk|pvp] [amount] [--name <name>]</#0079FF><gray>." spawn-invalid-name: "{prefix}<red>ɪɴᴠᴀʟɪᴅ ʙᴏᴛ ɴᴀᴍᴇ. <gray>ᴜꜱᴇ <white>1–16 <gray>ᴄʜᴀʀꜱ <dark_gray>(<white>ʟᴇᴛᴛᴇʀꜱ<gray>, <white>ᴅɪɡɪᴛꜱ<gray>, <white>_<dark_gray>)<gray>." spawn-name-taken: "{prefix}<red>ᴀ ʙᴏᴛ ɴᴀᴍᴇᴅ <white>{name} <red>ɪꜱ ᴀʟʀᴇᴀᴅʏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ." spawn-no-names-left: "{prefix}<red>ᴀʟʟ ɴᴀᴍᴇꜱ ɪɴ ᴛʜᴇ ᴘᴏᴏʟ ᴀʀᴇ ɪɴ ᴜꜱᴇ. <gray>ʀᴇᴅᴜᴄᴇ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ ʙᴏᴛꜱ ᴏʀ ᴀᴅᴅ ᴍᴏʀᴇ ɴᴀᴍᴇꜱ." # Console-specific spawn errors # {world} — the world name that was not found spawn-console-no-world: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ᴡᴏʀʟᴅ ɪꜱ ʟᴏᴀᴅᴇᴅ — ᴄᴀɴɴᴏᴛ ᴅᴇᴛᴇʀᴍɪɴᴇ ᴀ ꜱᴘᴀᴡɴ ʟᴏᴄᴀᴛɪᴏɴ." spawn-world-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ᴡᴏʀʟᴅ '<white>{world}<red>' ᴅᴏᴇꜱ ɴᴏᴛ ᴇxɪꜱᴛ ᴏʀ ɪꜱ ɴᴏᴛ ʟᴏᴀᴅᴇᴅ." spawn-invalid-coords: "{prefix}<red>ɪɴᴠᴀʟɪᴅ ᴄᴏᴏʀᴅɪɴᴀᴛᴇꜱ. <gray>ᴜꜱᴇ ꜰᴏʀᴍᴀᴛ: <white>x,y,z <gray><dark_gray>(ᴇ.ɢ. <white>100,64,200<gray>)" # PVP bot specific # {bot} — number of bots, {player} — target player name pvp-bot-target-set: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{bot}</#0079FF> <gray>ᴘᴠᴘ ʙᴏᴛ(ꜱ) ᴡɪʟʟ <red>ʜᴜɴᴛ <white>{player}<gray>." player-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ <white>{player} <red>ɪꜱ ɴᴏᴛ ᴏɴʟɪɴᴇ."
# ── Delete ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # {name} — bot name # {count} — bots deleted (delete all) delete-success: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ʜᴀꜱ ʙᴇᴇɴ <white>ᴅɪꜱᴄᴏɴɴᴇᴄᴛᴇᴅ<gray>." delete-all: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{count}</#0079FF> <gray>ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ(ꜱ) <white>ᴅɪꜱᴄᴏɴɴᴇᴄᴛᴇᴅ<gray>." delete-none: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ʙᴏᴛꜱ ᴀʀᴇ ᴄᴜʀʀᴇɴᴛʟʏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ." delete-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ ʙᴏᴛ ɴᴀᴍᴇᴅ <white>{name}<red> ᴡᴀꜱ ꜰᴏᴜɴᴅ." # {count} — number of bots randomly despawned delete-random-success: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{count}</#0079FF> <gray>ʀᴀɴᴅᴏᴍ ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ(ꜱ) <white>ᴅɪꜱᴄᴏɴɴᴇᴄᴛᴇᴅ<gray>."
# ── List ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── list-none: " <gray>ɴᴏ ʙᴏᴛꜱ ᴀʀᴇ ᴄᴜʀʀᴇɴᴛʟʏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ."
# ── Bot broadcast messages ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── # {name} — bot display name (colours preserved — do not wrap in MiniMessage tags) bot-join: "{prefix}{name} <gray>ᴊᴏɪɴᴇᴅ ᴛʜᴇ ɢᴀᴍᴇ<gray>." bot-leave: "{prefix}{name} <gray>ʟᴇꜰᴛ ᴛʜᴇ ɢᴀᴍᴇ<gray>."
# ── Fake chat ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── chat-enabled: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴄʜᴀᴛ</#0079FF> <gray>ʜᴀꜱ ʙᴇᴇɴ <white>ᴇɴᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." chat-disabled: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴄʜᴀᴛ</#0079FF> <gray>ʜᴀꜱ ʙᴇᴇɴ <white>ᴅɪꜱᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." chat-status-on: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴄʜᴀᴛ</#0079FF> <gray>ɪꜱ <white>ᴇɴᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." chat-status-off: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴄʜᴀᴛ</#0079FF> <gray>ɪꜱ <white>ᴅɪꜱᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." chat-invalid: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp chat <on|off|status></#0079FF> <dark_gray>|</dark_gray> <#0079FF>/fpp chat <bot> [on|off|say <msg>|tier <tier>]</#0079FF><gray>." # Per-bot chat management — {name} = bot display name # {message} = the message that was forced-sent # {tier} = the activity tier name | {tiers} = valid tiers list chat-bot-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ ʙᴏᴛ ɴᴀᴍᴇᴅ <white>{name}<red>." chat-bot-status-on: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ᴄʜᴀᴛ ɪꜱ <white>ᴇɴᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." chat-bot-status-off: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ᴄʜᴀᴛ ɪꜱ <white>ꜱɪʟᴇɴᴄᴇᴅ<gray>." chat-bot-enabled: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ᴡɪʟʟ <white>ɴᴏᴡ ᴄʜᴀᴛ<gray>." chat-bot-disabled: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ʜᴀꜱ ʙᴇᴇɴ <white>ꜱɪʟᴇɴᴄᴇᴅ<gray>." chat-bot-said: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ꜱᴀɪᴅ: <white>{message}" chat-bot-info: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>│ <gray>ᴇɴᴀʙʟᴇᴅ: <white>{enabled} <dark_gray>│ <gray>ᴛɪᴇʀ: <white>{tier} <dark_gray>│ <gray>ᴍᴜʟᴛ: <white>{multiplier}×" chat-bot-muted: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ʜᴀꜱ ʙᴇᴇɴ <white>ᴘᴇʀᴍᴀɴᴇɴᴛʟʏ ꜱɪʟᴇɴᴄᴇᴅ<gray>." chat-bot-muted-timed: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ꜱɪʟᴇɴᴄᴇᴅ ꜰᴏʀ <white>{seconds}ꜱ<gray>." chat-mute-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp chat <bot> mute [seconds]</#0079FF><gray>." chat-bot-tier-set: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><gray>'ꜱ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠɪᴛʏ ᴛɪᴇʀ ꜱᴇᴛ ᴛᴏ <white>{tier}<gray>." chat-bot-tier-reset: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><gray>'ꜱ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠɪᴛʏ ᴛɪᴇʀ ʀᴇꜱᴇᴛ ᴛᴏ <white>ʀᴀɴᴅᴏᴍ<gray>." chat-bot-tier-invalid: "{prefix}<red>ɪɴᴠᴀʟɪᴅ ᴛɪᴇʀ '<white>{tier}<red>'. <gray>ᴜꜱᴇ: <white>{tiers}<gray>." chat-say-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp chat <bot> say <message></#0079FF><gray>." chat-tier-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp chat <bot> tier <quiet|passive|normal|active|chatty|reset></#0079FF><gray>." # /fpp chat all — bulk bot chat control # {count} = number of bots affected | {enabled}/{disabled} = status counts | {tier} = tier name | {message} = message text chat-all-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp chat all <on|off|status|say <msg>|tier <tier>></#0079FF><gray>." chat-all-say-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp chat all say <message></#0079FF><gray>." chat-all-enabled: "{prefix}<gray>ᴀʟʟ <white>{count}<gray> ʙᴏᴛ(ꜱ) ᴡɪʟʟ <white>ɴᴏᴡ ᴄʜᴀᴛ<gray>." chat-all-disabled: "{prefix}<gray>ᴀʟʟ <white>{count}<gray> ʙᴏᴛ(ꜱ) ʜᴀᴠᴇ ʙᴇᴇɴ <white>ꜱɪʟᴇɴᴄᴇᴅ<gray>." chat-all-status: "{prefix}<gray>ᴄʜᴀᴛ ᴇɴᴀʙʟᴇᴅ: <white>{enabled}<gray> | ꜱɪʟᴇɴᴄᴇᴅ: <white>{disabled}<gray>." chat-all-said: "{prefix}<gray>ᴍᴇꜱꜱᴀɢᴇ ꜱᴇɴᴛ ᴛʜʀᴏᴜɢʜ <white>{count}<gray> ʙᴏᴛ(ꜱ): <white>{message}" chat-all-tier-set: "{prefix}<gray>ᴀʟʟ ʙᴏᴛꜱ' ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠɪᴛʏ ᴛɪᴇʀ ꜱᴇᴛ ᴛᴏ <white>{tier}<gray>." chat-all-tier-reset: "{prefix}<gray>ᴀʟʟ ʙᴏᴛꜱ' ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠɪᴛʏ ᴛɪᴇʀ ʀᴇꜱᴇᴛ ᴛᴏ <white>ʀᴀɴᴅᴏᴍ<gray>."
# ── Info / database ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # {name} — bot or spawner name queried info-no-records: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ʀᴇᴄᴏʀᴅꜱ ꜰᴏᴜɴᴅ ꜰᴏʀ <white>{name}<red>." info-db-unavailable: "{prefix}<red>ᴅᴀᴛᴀʙᴀꜱᴇ ᴜɴᴀᴠᴀɪʟᴀʙʟᴇ. ᴄʜᴇᴄᴋ ʏᴏᴜʀ ᴄᴏɴꜰɪɢ ᴀɴᴅ ꜱᴇʀᴠᴇʀ ʟᴏɡꜱ."
# ── Teleport ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # {name} — bot name tph-success: "{prefix}<gray>ᴛᴇʟᴇᴘᴏʀᴛᴇᴅ <#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ᴛᴏ ʏᴏᴜ." tph-no-bots: "{prefix}<red>ʏᴏᴜ ʜᴀᴠᴇ ɴᴏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ ʙᴏᴛꜱ." tph-specify-name: "{prefix}<red>ʏᴏᴜ ʜᴀᴠᴇ ᴍᴜʟᴛɪᴘʟᴇ ʙᴏᴛꜱ. <gray>ꜱᴘᴇᴄɪꜰʏ ᴏɴᴇ: <#0079FF>/fpp tph <botname></#0079FF>" tph-not-yours: "{prefix}<red>ʏᴏᴜ ᴅᴏɴ'ᴛ ᴏᴡɴ ᴀ ʙᴏᴛ ɴᴀᴍᴇᴅ <white>{name}<red>." tph-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ ʙᴏᴛ ɴᴀᴍᴇᴅ <white>{name}<red>." tph-failed: "{prefix}<red>ᴄᴏᴜʟᴅ ɴᴏᴛ ᴛᴇʟᴇᴘᴏʀᴛ <white>{name}<red> — ᴇɴᴛɪᴛʏ ɪɴᴠᴀʟɪᴅ." tp-specify-name: "{prefix}<red>ᴍᴜʟᴛɪᴘʟᴇ ʙᴏᴛꜱ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ. <gray>ꜱᴘᴇᴄɪꜰʏ ᴏɴᴇ: <#0079FF>/fpp tp <botname></#0079FF>"

# ── Freeze ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # {name} — bot display name | {count} — number of bots (all) freeze-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp freeze <bot|all> [on|off]</#0079FF><gray>." freeze-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ ʙᴏᴛ ɴᴀᴍᴇᴅ <white>{name}<red>." freeze-frozen: "{prefix}<#66CCFF>❄</#66CCFF> <#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ɪꜱ ɴᴏᴡ <white>ꜰʀᴏᴢᴇɴ<gray>." freeze-unfrozen: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ɪꜱ ɴᴏᴡ <white>ᴜɴꜰʀᴏᴢᴇɴ<gray>." freeze-all-frozen: "{prefix}<#66CCFF>❄</#66CCFF> <#0079FF>{count}</#0079FF> <gray>ʙᴏᴛ(ꜱ) ꜰʀᴏᴢᴇɴ<gray>." freeze-all-unfrozen: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{count}</#0079FF> <gray>ʙᴏᴛ(ꜱ) ᴜɴꜰʀᴏᴢᴇɴ<gray>."
# ── Spawn cooldown ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # {seconds} — seconds remaining on cooldown spawn-cooldown: "{prefix}<red>ᴘʟᴇᴀꜱᴇ ᴡᴀɪᴛ <white>{seconds}s<red> ʙᴇꜰᴏʀᴇ ꜱᴘᴀᴡɴɪɴɢ ᴀɡᴀɪɴ."
# ── Rank (LuckPerms group assignment) ───────────────────────────────────────── # {bot} — bot display name # {group} — LuckPerms group name # {count} — number of bots assigned rank-no-luckperms: "{prefix}<red>ʟᴜᴄᴋᴘᴇʀᴍꜱ ɪꜱ ɴᴏᴛ ɪɴꜱᴛᴀʟʟᴇᴅ ᴏʀ ᴇɴᴀʙʟᴇᴅ." rank-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp rank <bot> <group|clear></#0079FF><gray> <dark_gray>|</dark_gray> <#0079FF>/fpp rank random <group> [num]</#0079FF><gray> <dark_gray>|</dark_gray> <#0079FF>/fpp rank list</#0079FF><gray>." rank-bot-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ ʙᴏᴛ ɴᴀᴍᴇᴅ <white>{name}<red>." rank-group-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ʟᴜᴄᴋᴘᴇʀᴍꜱ ɢʀᴏᴜᴘ <white>{group}<red> ᴅᴏᴇꜱ ɴᴏᴛ ᴇxɪꜱᴛ."
# ── Alert (cross-server broadcast) ──────────────────────────────────────────── # {message} — the alert text alert-received: "{prefix}<red><bold>ᴀʟᴇʀᴛ<reset> <dark_gray>» <white>{message}" alert-sent: "{prefix}<#66CC66>✓</#66CC66> <gray>ᴀʟᴇʀᴛ ʙʀᴏᴀᴅᴄᴀꜱᴛᴇᴅ ᴛᴏ <#0079FF>ᴀʟʟ ꜱᴇʀᴠᴇʀꜱ</#0079FF><gray>." alert-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp alert <message></#0079FF><gray>."
# ── Sync (config synchronization) ───────────────────────────────────────────── # {file} — config file name | {count} — number of files with local changes sync-not-available: "{prefix}<red>ᴄᴏɴꜰɪɢ ꜱʏɴᴄ ɪꜱ ɴᴏᴛ ᴀᴠᴀɪʟᴀʙʟᴇ <dark_gray>(ɴᴇᴛᴡᴏʀᴋ ᴍᴏᴅᴇ ᴏɴʟʏ<dark_gray>)<red>." sync-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp sync <push|pull|check|status> [file]</#0079FF><gray>." sync-push-success: "{prefix}<#66CC66>✓</#66CC66> <gray>ᴘᴜꜱʜᴇᴅ <#0079FF>{file}</#0079FF> <gray>ᴛᴏ ᴅᴀᴛᴀʙᴀꜱᴇ." sync-push-failed: "{prefix}<red>ꜰᴀɪʟᴇᴅ ᴛᴏ ᴘᴜꜱʜ <white>{file}<red> ᴛᴏ ᴅᴀᴛᴀʙᴀꜱᴇ." sync-push-all-success: "{prefix}<#66CC66>✓</#66CC66> <gray>ᴘᴜꜱʜᴇᴅ <#0079FF>ᴀʟʟ ᴄᴏɴꜰɪɡ ꜰɪʟᴇꜱ</#0079FF> <gray>ᴛᴏ ᴅᴀᴛᴀʙᴀꜱᴇ." sync-pull-success: "{prefix}<#66CC66>✓</#66CC66> <gray>ᴘᴜʟʟᴇᴅ <#0079FF>{file}</#0079FF> <gray>ꜰʀᴏᴍ ᴅᴀᴛᴀʙᴀꜱᴇ." sync-pull-failed: "{prefix}<red>ꜰᴀɪʟᴇᴅ ᴛᴏ ᴘᴜʟʟ <white>{file}<red> ꜰʀᴏᴍ ᴅᴀᴛᴀʙᴀꜱᴇ." sync-pull-all-success: "{prefix}<#66CC66>✓</#66CC66> <gray>ᴘᴜʟʟᴇᴅ <#0079FF>ᴀʟʟ ᴄᴏɴꜰɪɡ ꜰɪʟᴇꜱ</#0079FF> <gray>ꜰʀᴏᴍ ᴅᴀᴛᴀʙᴀꜱᴇ." sync-pull-no-updates: "{prefix}<gray>ᴀʟʟ ᴄᴏɴꜰɪɡ ꜰɪʟᴇꜱ ᴀʀᴇ ᴀʟʀᴇᴀᴅʏ ᴜᴘ ᴛᴏ ᴅᴀᴛᴇ." sync-pull-reload-hint: "{prefix}<gray>ʀᴜɴ <#0079FF>/fpp reload</#0079FF> <gray>ᴛᴏ ᴀᴘᴘʟʏ ᴛʜᴇ ᴄʜᴀɴɢᴇꜱ." sync-check-has-changes: "{prefix}<yellow>⚠<reset> <#0079FF>{file}</#0079FF> <gray>ʜᴀꜱ ʟᴏᴄᴀʟ ᴄʜᴀɴɢᴇꜱ <dark_gray>(ᴅɪꜰꜰᴇʀᴇɴᴛ ꜰʀᴏᴍ ᴅᴀᴛᴀʙᴀꜱᴇ<dark_gray>)." sync-check-no-changes: "{prefix}<#66CC66>✓</#66CC66> <#0079FF>{file}</#0079FF> <gray>ɪꜱ ᴜᴘ ᴛᴏ ᴅᴀᴛᴇ ᴡɪᴛʜ ᴅᴀᴛᴀʙᴀꜱᴇ." sync-check-all-clean: "{prefix}<#66CC66>✓</#66CC66> <gray>ᴀʟʟ ᴄᴏɴꜰɪɢ ꜰɪʟᴇꜱ ꜱʏɴᴄʜʀᴏɴɪᴢᴇᴅ ᴡɪᴛʜ ᴅᴀᴛᴀʙᴀꜱᴇ." sync-check-summary: "{prefix}<gray>ꜱʏɴᴄ ꜱᴛᴀᴛᴜꜱ: <#0079FF>{count}</#0079FF> <gray>ꜰɪʟᴇ(ꜱ) ᴡɪᴛʜ ʟᴏᴄᴀʟ ᴄʜᴀɴɢᴇꜱ." sync-status-no-network: "{prefix}<red>ꜱʏɴᴄ ɪꜱ ᴅɪꜱᴀʙʟᴇᴅ <dark_gray>(ɴᴏᴛ ɪɴ ɴᴇᴛᴡᴏʀᴋ ᴍᴏᴅᴇ<dark_gray>)<red>."
# ── Swap (session rotation) ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── # {sessions} — number of active session timers | {offline} — bots waiting to rejoin # {name} — bot name | {count} — bot count | {next} — time until next swap # {personality} — bot personality | {swaps} — swap count swap-enabled: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ꜱᴇꜱꜱɪᴏɴ ʀᴏᴛᴀᴛɪᴏɴ</#0079FF> <gray>ʜᴀꜱ ʙᴇᴇɴ <white>ᴇɴᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." swap-disabled: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ꜱᴇꜱꜱɪᴏɴ ʀᴏᴛᴀᴛɪᴏɴ</#0079FF> <gray>ʜᴀꜱ ʙᴇᴇɴ <white>ᴅɪꜱᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." swap-status-on: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ꜱᴇꜱꜱɪᴏɴ ʀᴏᴛᴀᴛɪᴏɴ</#0079FF> <gray>ɪꜱ <white>ᴇɴᴀʙʟᴇᴅ <dark_gray>│ <gray>ꜱᴇꜱꜱɪᴏɴꜱ: <#0079FF>{sessions}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>│ <gray>ᴏꜰꜰʟɪɴᴇ: <#0079FF>{offline}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>│ <gray>ɴᴇxᴛ: <#0079FF>{next}</#0079FF>" swap-status-off: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ꜱᴇꜱꜱɪᴏɴ ʀᴏᴛᴀᴛɪᴏɴ</#0079FF> <gray>ɪꜱ <white>ᴅɪꜱᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." swap-invalid: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp swap</#0079FF> <dark_gray>[<gray>ᴛᴏɢɢʟᴇ<dark_gray>]</dark_gray> <dark_gray>│</dark_gray> <#0079FF>/fpp swap <on|off|status|now <bot>|list></#0079FF><gray>." swap-now-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp swap now <bot></#0079FF><gray>." swap-not-available: "{prefix}<red>ꜱᴡᴀᴘ ꜱʏꜱᴛᴇᴍ ɴᴏᴛ ᴀᴠᴀɪʟᴀʙʟᴇ." swap-now-success: "{prefix}<#66CC66>✓</#66CC66> <#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ɪꜱ ɴᴏᴡ ʟᴇᴀᴠɪɴɢ<gray>." swap-now-failed: "{prefix}<red>ꜰᴀɪʟᴇᴅ ᴛᴏ ꜱᴡᴀᴘ ᴏᴜᴛ <white>{name}<red>." swap-list-empty: "{prefix}<gray>ɴᴏ ʙᴏᴛꜱ ᴄᴜʀʀᴇɴᴛʟʏ ꜱᴄʜᴇᴅᴜʟᴇᴅ ꜰᴏʀ ꜱᴡᴀᴘ." swap-list-header: "{prefix}<gray>ꜱᴄʜᴇᴅᴜʟᴇᴅ ʙᴏᴛꜱ<gray>: <#0079FF>{count}</#0079FF>" swap-list-entry: " <dark_gray>• <#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>│ <gray>{personality} <dark_gray>│ <gray>ᴄʏᴄʟᴇꜱ: <white>{swaps}"
# ── Peak Hours (time-based bot pool scheduling) ──────────────────────────────── # {window} — active time window label (e.g. 18:00–22:00) # {fraction} — current target fraction as a % (e.g. 75%) # {target} — target number of bots online # {sleeping} — bots currently sleeping in the peak-hours pool # {online} — AFK bots currently online # {swapping} — bots temporarily offline via BotSwapAI session rotation # {total} — total pool size (online + sleeping + swapping) # {time} — human-readable time until next window (e.g. 1h 20m) # {next_fraction} — fraction of the next window (e.g. 5%) peaks-enabled: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ᴘᴇᴀᴋ ʜᴏᴜʀꜱ</#0079FF> <gray>ᴇɴᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." peaks-disabled: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ᴘᴇᴀᴋ ʜᴏᴜʀꜱ</#0079FF> <gray>ᴅɪꜱᴀʙʟᴇᴅ — ᴀʟʟ ꜱʟᴇᴇᴘɪɴɢ ʙᴏᴛꜱ ᴡᴏᴋᴇɴ<gray>." peaks-status-on: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ᴘᴇᴀᴋ ʜᴏᴜʀꜱ</#0079FF> <dark_gray>│ <gray>ᴡɪɴᴅᴏᴡ: <white>{window} <dark_gray>│ <gray>ꜰʀᴀᴄᴛɪᴏɴ: <#0079FF>{fraction}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>│ <gray>ᴛᴀʀɢᴇᴛ: <#0079FF>{target}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>│ <gray>ᴏɴʟɪɴᴇ: <#0079FF>{online}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>│ <gray>ꜱᴡᴀᴘᴘɪɴɢ: <#0079FF>{swapping}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>│ <gray>ꜱʟᴇᴇᴘɪɴɢ: <#0079FF>{sleeping}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>│ <gray>ᴛᴏᴛᴀʟ: <#0079FF>{total}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>│ <gray>ᴛᴢ: <white>{timezone}" peaks-status-off: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ᴘᴇᴀᴋ ʜᴏᴜʀꜱ</#0079FF> <gray>ɪꜱ <white>ᴅɪꜱᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." peaks-next-window: "{prefix}<gray>ɴᴇxᴛ ᴡɪɴᴅᴏᴡ ɪɴ <#0079FF>{time}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>→ <#0079FF>{next_fraction}</#0079FF> <gray>ᴏꜰ ʙᴏᴛꜱ ᴡɪʟʟ ʙᴇ ᴏɴʟɪɴᴇ<gray>." peaks-no-windows: "{prefix}<gray>ɴᴏ ᴡɪɴᴅᴏᴡꜱ ᴄᴏɴꜰɪɢᴜʀᴇᴅ — ᴇᴅɪᴛ <white>peak-hours.schedule<gray> ɪɴ config.yml." peaks-requires-swap: "{prefix}<red>ᴘᴇᴀᴋ ʜᴏᴜʀꜱ ʀᴇQᴜɪʀᴇꜱ <white>swap.enabled: true<red>. ʀᴜɴ <white>/fpp swap on<red> ꜰɪʀꜱᴛ." peaks-invalid: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp peaks <on|off|status|next|force|list|wake|sleep></#0079FF><gray>." peaks-force-check: "{prefix}<gray>ᴘᴇᴀᴋ-ʜᴏᴜʀꜱ ᴇᴠᴀʟᴜᴀᴛɪᴏɴ ᴛʀɪɢɢᴇʀᴇᴅ." peaks-list-header: "{prefix}<gray>ꜱʟᴇᴇᴘɪɴɢ ʙᴏᴛꜱ <dark_gray>(<#0079FF>{count}</#0079FF>)<gray>:" peaks-list-entry: " <dark_gray>┃ <white>{name} <dark_gray>@ <gray>{world} <dark_gray>[<gray>{x}<dark_gray>, <gray>{y}<dark_gray>, <gray>{z}<dark_gray>]" peaks-list-empty: "{prefix}<gray>ɴᴏ ʙᴏᴛꜱ ᴀʀᴇ ᴄᴜʀʀᴇɴᴛʟʏ ꜱʟᴇᴇᴘɪɴɢ." peaks-wake-success: "{prefix}<gray>ᴡᴏᴋᴇ <white>{name}<gray>." peaks-wake-all: "{prefix}<gray>ᴡᴏᴋᴇ <#0079FF>{count}</#0079FF> ꜱʟᴇᴇᴘɪɴɢ ʙᴏᴛ(ꜱ)." peaks-sleep-success: "{prefix}<gray>ᴘᴜᴛ <white>{name}<gray> ᴛᴏ ꜱʟᴇᴇᴘ." peaks-sleep-failed: "{prefix}<red>ʙᴏᴛ '<white>{name}<red>' ɴᴏᴛ ꜰᴏᴜɴᴅ ᴏʀ ɴᴏᴛ ᴇʟɪɢɪʙʟᴇ." peaks-transition: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ᴘᴇᴀᴋ ᴡɪɴᴅᴏᴡ</#0079FF><gray>: <white>{window} <dark_gray>({fraction} <gray>ᴏꜰ ʙᴏᴛꜱ ᴏɴʟɪɴᴇ<dark_gray>)<gray>."

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ ᴘʟᴜɢɪɴ · language/en.yml # English language file — edit and run /fpp reload to apply changes. # # Colour format : MiniMessage tags # Named colours : <red>, <gray>, <white>, <dark_gray>, <yellow> … # Hex colours : <#0079FF>text</#0079FF> # Decorations : <bold>, <italic>, <underlined>, <strikethrough> # Reset : <reset> # Placeholders : {placeholder} — see each entry for available ones # # ⚠ Keys marked "INTERNAL — do not edit" are used by the plugin's layout # engine. Changing them will break formatting. # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# ── Plugin prefix — prepended to all [FPP] messages ────────────────────────── # Feel free to change the colour/text, but keep it short. prefix: "<dark_gray>[<#0079FF>ꜰᴘᴘ</#0079FF><dark_gray>]<reset> "
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # INTERNAL LAYOUT STRINGS — do not remove or rename these keys. # You may adjust colours/characters but keep the structure intact. # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Horizontal rule used in headers and footers divider: "<dark_gray><st>━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━</st>"
# Help menu — INTERNAL (placeholders {cmd}, {args}, {desc} required) help-header: "<dark_gray><st>━━━━━━━━━</st> <#0079FF><bold>ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ ᴘʟᴜɢɪɴ</#0079FF> <dark_gray><st>━━━━━━━━━</st>" help-entry: " <#0079FF>/{cmd}</#0079FF><gray> {args} <dark_gray>— <white>{desc}" help-footer: "<dark_gray><st>━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━</st>"
# Plugin info screen (/fpp bare) — INTERNAL header line info-screen-header: " <#0079FF><bold>ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ ᴘʟᴜɢɪɴ</#0079FF> <dark_gray>· <gray>ꜰᴘᴘ"
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # PLAYER-FACING MESSAGES — safe to edit freely # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# ── Generic errors ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── no-permission: "{prefix}<red>ʏᴏᴜ ᴅᴏɴ'ᴛ ʜᴀᴠᴇ ᴘᴇʀᴍɪꜱꜱɪᴏɴ ᴛᴏ ᴅᴏ ᴛʜɪꜱ." unknown-command: "{prefix}<red>ᴜɴᴋɴᴏᴡɴ ꜱᴜʙ-ᴄᴏᴍᴍᴀɴᴅ. <gray>ᴛʀʏ <#0079FF>/{0} ʜᴇʟᴘ</#0079FF><gray> ꜰᴏʀ ᴀ ʟɪꜱᴛ." player-only: "{prefix}<red>ᴏɴʟʏ ᴀ ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ ᴄᴀɴ ʀᴜɴ ᴛʜɪꜱ ᴄᴏᴍᴍᴀɴᴅ." invalid-number: "{prefix}<red>ɪɴᴠᴀʟɪᴅ ɴᴜᴍʙᴇʀ. ᴘʟᴇᴀꜱᴇ ᴇɴᴛᴇʀ ᴀ ᴘᴏꜱɪᴛɪᴠᴇ ɪɴᴛᴇɢᴇʀ."
# ── Spawn ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # {count} — number of bots spawned # {total} — total bots now active # {name} — custom bot name (name-taken / invalid-name errors) # {max} — max bot limit (max-reached error) # {limit} — personal limit (user-limit-reached error) spawn-success: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{count}</#0079FF> <gray>ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ(ꜱ) <white>ꜱᴜᴍᴍᴏɴᴇᴅ<gray>. <dark_gray>(<#0079FF>{total}</#0079FF> <gray>ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ<dark_gray>)" spawn-max-reached: "{prefix}<red>ᴍᴀx ʙᴏᴛ ʟɪᴍɪᴛ ʀᴇᴀᴄʜᴇᴅ <dark_gray>(<#0079FF>{max}</#0079FF> <gray>ʙᴏᴛꜱ<dark_gray>)<red>. ᴅᴇʟᴇᴛᴇ ꜱᴏᴍᴇ ꜰɪʀꜱᴛ." spawn-user-limit-reached: "{prefix}<red>ʏᴏᴜ'ᴠᴇ ʀᴇᴀᴄʜᴇᴅ ʏᴏᴜʀ ᴘᴇʀꜱᴏɴᴀʟ ʙᴏᴛ ʟɪᴍɪᴛ <dark_gray>(<#0079FF>{limit}</#0079FF> <gray>ʙᴏᴛ(ꜱ)<dark_gray>)<red>." spawn-invalid: "{prefix}<red>ɪɴᴠᴀʟɪᴅ ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ. <gray>ᴛʀʏ <#0079FF>/fpp spawn [afk|pvp] [amount] [--name <name>]</#0079FF><gray>." spawn-invalid-name: "{prefix}<red>ɪɴᴠᴀʟɪᴅ ʙᴏᴛ ɴᴀᴍᴇ. <gray>ᴜꜱᴇ <white>1–16 <gray>ᴄʜᴀʀꜱ <dark_gray>(<white>ʟᴇᴛᴛᴇʀꜱ<gray>, <white>ᴅɪɡɪᴛꜱ<gray>, <white>_<dark_gray>)<gray>." spawn-name-taken: "{prefix}<red>ᴀ ʙᴏᴛ ɴᴀᴍᴇᴅ <white>{name} <red>ɪꜱ ᴀʟʀᴇᴀᴅʏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ." spawn-no-names-left: "{prefix}<red>ᴀʟʟ ɴᴀᴍᴇꜱ ɪɴ ᴛʜᴇ ᴘᴏᴏʟ ᴀʀᴇ ɪɴ ᴜꜱᴇ. <gray>ʀᴇᴅᴜᴄᴇ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ ʙᴏᴛꜱ ᴏʀ ᴀᴅᴅ ᴍᴏʀᴇ ɴᴀᴍᴇꜱ." # Console-specific spawn errors # {world} — the world name that was not found spawn-console-no-world: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ᴡᴏʀʟᴅ ɪꜱ ʟᴏᴀᴅᴇᴅ — ᴄᴀɴɴᴏᴛ ᴅᴇᴛᴇʀᴍɪɴᴇ ᴀ ꜱᴘᴀᴡɴ ʟᴏᴄᴀᴛɪᴏɴ." spawn-world-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ᴡᴏʀʟᴅ '<white>{world}<red>' ᴅᴏᴇꜱ ɴᴏᴛ ᴇxɪꜱᴛ ᴏʀ ɪꜱ ɴᴏᴛ ʟᴏᴀᴅᴇᴅ." spawn-invalid-coords: "{prefix}<red>ɪɴᴠᴀʟɪᴅ ᴄᴏᴏʀᴅɪɴᴀᴛᴇꜱ. <gray>ᴜꜱᴇ ꜰᴏʀᴍᴀᴛ: <white>x,y,z <gray><dark_gray>(ᴇ.ɢ. <white>100,64,200<gray>)" # PVP bot specific # {bot} — number of bots, {player} — target player name pvp-bot-target-set: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{bot}</#0079FF> <gray>ᴘᴠᴘ ʙᴏᴛ(ꜱ) ᴡɪʟʟ <red>ʜᴜɴᴛ <white>{player}<gray>." player-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ <white>{player} <red>ɪꜱ ɴᴏᴛ ᴏɴʟɪɴᴇ."
# ── Delete ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # {name} — bot name # {count} — bots deleted (delete all) delete-success: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ʜᴀꜱ ʙᴇᴇɴ <white>ᴅɪꜱᴄᴏɴɴᴇᴄᴛᴇᴅ<gray>." delete-all: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{count}</#0079FF> <gray>ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ(ꜱ) <white>ᴅɪꜱᴄᴏɴɴᴇᴄᴛᴇᴅ<gray>." delete-none: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ʙᴏᴛꜱ ᴀʀᴇ ᴄᴜʀʀᴇɴᴛʟʏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ." delete-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ ʙᴏᴛ ɴᴀᴍᴇᴅ <white>{name}<red> ᴡᴀꜱ ꜰᴏᴜɴᴅ." # {count} — number of bots randomly despawned delete-random-success: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{count}</#0079FF> <gray>ʀᴀɴᴅᴏᴍ ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ(ꜱ) <white>ᴅɪꜱᴄᴏɴɴᴇᴄᴛᴇᴅ<gray>."
# ── List ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── list-none: " <gray>ɴᴏ ʙᴏᴛꜱ ᴀʀᴇ ᴄᴜʀʀᴇɴᴛʟʏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ."
# ── Bot broadcast messages ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── # {name} — bot display name (colours preserved — do not wrap in MiniMessage tags) bot-join: "{prefix}{name} <gray>ᴊᴏɪɴᴇᴅ ᴛʜᴇ ɢᴀᴍᴇ<gray>." bot-leave: "{prefix}{name} <gray>ʟᴇꜰᴛ ᴛʜᴇ ɢᴀᴍᴇ<gray>."
# ── Fake chat ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── chat-enabled: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴄʜᴀᴛ</#0079FF> <gray>ʜᴀꜱ ʙᴇᴇɴ <white>ᴇɴᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." chat-disabled: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴄʜᴀᴛ</#0079FF> <gray>ʜᴀꜱ ʙᴇᴇɴ <white>ᴅɪꜱᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." chat-status-on: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴄʜᴀᴛ</#0079FF> <gray>ɪꜱ <white>ᴇɴᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." chat-status-off: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴄʜᴀᴛ</#0079FF> <gray>ɪꜱ <white>ᴅɪꜱᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." chat-invalid: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp chat <on|off|status></#0079FF> <dark_gray>|</dark_gray> <#0079FF>/fpp chat <bot> [on|off|say <msg>|tier <tier>]</#0079FF><gray>." # Per-bot chat management — {name} = bot display name # {message} = the message that was forced-sent # {tier} = the activity tier name | {tiers} = valid tiers list chat-bot-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ ʙᴏᴛ ɴᴀᴍᴇᴅ <white>{name}<red>." chat-bot-status-on: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ᴄʜᴀᴛ ɪꜱ <white>ᴇɴᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." chat-bot-status-off: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ᴄʜᴀᴛ ɪꜱ <white>ꜱɪʟᴇɴᴄᴇᴅ<gray>." chat-bot-enabled: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ᴡɪʟʟ <white>ɴᴏᴡ ᴄʜᴀᴛ<gray>." chat-bot-disabled: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ʜᴀꜱ ʙᴇᴇɴ <white>ꜱɪʟᴇɴᴄᴇᴅ<gray>." chat-bot-said: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ꜱᴀɪᴅ: <white>{message}" chat-bot-info: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>│ <gray>ᴇɴᴀʙʟᴇᴅ: <white>{enabled} <dark_gray>│ <gray>ᴛɪᴇʀ: <white>{tier} <dark_gray>│ <gray>ᴍᴜʟᴛ: <white>{multiplier}×" chat-bot-muted: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ʜᴀꜱ ʙᴇᴇɴ <white>ᴘᴇʀᴍᴀɴᴇɴᴛʟʏ ꜱɪʟᴇɴᴄᴇᴅ<gray>." chat-bot-muted-timed: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ꜱɪʟᴇɴᴄᴇᴅ ꜰᴏʀ <white>{seconds}ꜱ<gray>." chat-mute-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp chat <bot> mute [seconds]</#0079FF><gray>." chat-bot-tier-set: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><gray>'ꜱ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠɪᴛʏ ᴛɪᴇʀ ꜱᴇᴛ ᴛᴏ <white>{tier}<gray>." chat-bot-tier-reset: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><gray>'ꜱ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠɪᴛʏ ᴛɪᴇʀ ʀᴇꜱᴇᴛ ᴛᴏ <white>ʀᴀɴᴅᴏᴍ<gray>." chat-bot-tier-invalid: "{prefix}<red>ɪɴᴠᴀʟɪᴅ ᴛɪᴇʀ '<white>{tier}<red>'. <gray>ᴜꜱᴇ: <white>{tiers}<gray>." chat-say-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp chat <bot> say <message></#0079FF><gray>." chat-tier-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp chat <bot> tier <quiet|passive|normal|active|chatty|reset></#0079FF><gray>." # /fpp chat all — bulk bot chat control # {count} = number of bots affected | {enabled}/{disabled} = status counts | {tier} = tier name | {message} = message text chat-all-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp chat all <on|off|status|say <msg>|tier <tier>></#0079FF><gray>." chat-all-say-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp chat all say <message></#0079FF><gray>." chat-all-enabled: "{prefix}<gray>ᴀʟʟ <white>{count}<gray> ʙᴏᴛ(ꜱ) ᴡɪʟʟ <white>ɴᴏᴡ ᴄʜᴀᴛ<gray>." chat-all-disabled: "{prefix}<gray>ᴀʟʟ <white>{count}<gray> ʙᴏᴛ(ꜱ) ʜᴀᴠᴇ ʙᴇᴇɴ <white>ꜱɪʟᴇɴᴄᴇᴅ<gray>." chat-all-status: "{prefix}<gray>ᴄʜᴀᴛ ᴇɴᴀʙʟᴇᴅ: <white>{enabled}<gray> | ꜱɪʟᴇɴᴄᴇᴅ: <white>{disabled}<gray>." chat-all-said: "{prefix}<gray>ᴍᴇꜱꜱᴀɢᴇ ꜱᴇɴᴛ ᴛʜʀᴏᴜɢʜ <white>{count}<gray> ʙᴏᴛ(ꜱ): <white>{message}" chat-all-tier-set: "{prefix}<gray>ᴀʟʟ ʙᴏᴛꜱ' ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠɪᴛʏ ᴛɪᴇʀ ꜱᴇᴛ ᴛᴏ <white>{tier}<gray>." chat-all-tier-reset: "{prefix}<gray>ᴀʟʟ ʙᴏᴛꜱ' ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠɪᴛʏ ᴛɪᴇʀ ʀᴇꜱᴇᴛ ᴛᴏ <white>ʀᴀɴᴅᴏᴍ<gray>."
# ── Info / database ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # {name} — bot or spawner name queried info-no-records: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ʀᴇᴄᴏʀᴅꜱ ꜰᴏᴜɴᴅ ꜰᴏʀ <white>{name}<red>." info-db-unavailable: "{prefix}<red>ᴅᴀᴛᴀʙᴀꜱᴇ ᴜɴᴀᴠᴀɪʟᴀʙʟᴇ. ᴄʜᴇᴄᴋ ʏᴏᴜʀ ᴄᴏɴꜰɪɢ ᴀɴᴅ ꜱᴇʀᴠᴇʀ ʟᴏɡꜱ."

All commands are disabled. <click:open_url:'https://discord.gg/RfjEJDG2TM'><#0079FF><underlined>Discord</underlined></#0079FF></click>" # Shown to ops/admins on join and scheduled as a persistent join-notification while the server runs an unsupported version. version-unsupported-admin: "<dark_gray><st>━━━━━━━━━</st> <bold><red>⚠ ᴜɴꜱᴜᴘᴘᴏʀᴛᴇᴅ ᴠᴇʀꜱɪᴏɴ ⚠</red></bold> <dark_gray><st>━━━━━━━━━</st>\n <red>FakePlayerPlugin is <bold>ɴᴏᴛ ꜱᴜᴘᴘᴏʀᴛᴇᴅ</bold> on <white>MC {version}<red>. (Supported: up to <white>MC 1.21.11<red>)\n <gray>All /fpp commands have been disabled until an update is released.\n <gray>If you think this is a bug, contact us: <click:open_url:'https://discord.gg/RfjEJDG2TM'><#0079FF><underlined>Discord</underlined></#0079FF></click><gray>.\n<dark_gray><st>━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━</st>"
# ── Freeze ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # {name} — bot display name | {count} — number of bots (all) freeze-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp freeze <bot|all> [on|off]</#0079FF><gray>." freeze-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ ʙᴏᴛ ɴᴀᴍᴇᴅ <white>{name}<red>." freeze-frozen: "{prefix}<#66CCFF>❄</#66CCFF> <#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ɪꜱ ɴᴏᴡ <white>ꜰʀᴏᴢᴇɴ<gray>." freeze-unfrozen: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ɪꜱ ɴᴏᴡ <white>ᴜɴꜰʀᴏᴢᴇɴ<gray>." freeze-all-frozen: "{prefix}<#66CCFF>❄</#66CCFF> <#0079FF>{count}</#0079FF> <gray>ʙᴏᴛ(ꜱ) ꜰʀᴏᴢᴇɴ<gray>." freeze-all-unfrozen: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{count}</#0079FF> <gray>ʙᴏᴛ(ꜱ) ᴜɴꜰʀᴏᴢᴇɴ<gray>."
# ── Spawn cooldown ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # {seconds} — seconds remaining on cooldown spawn-cooldown: "{prefix}<red>ᴘʟᴇᴀꜱᴇ ᴡᴀɪᴛ <white>{seconds}s<red> ʙᴇꜰᴏʀᴇ ꜱᴘᴀᴡɴɪɴɢ ᴀɡᴀɪɴ."
# ── Rank (LuckPerms group assignment) ───────────────────────────────────────── # {bot} — bot display name # {group} — LuckPerms group name # {count} — number of bots assigned rank-no-luckperms: "{prefix}<red>ʟᴜᴄᴋᴘᴇʀᴍꜱ ɪꜱ ɴᴏᴛ ɪɴꜱᴛᴀʟʟᴇᴅ ᴏʀ ᴇɴᴀʙʟᴇᴅ." rank-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp rank <bot> <group|clear></#0079FF><gray> <dark_gray>|</dark_gray> <#0079FF>/fpp rank random <group> [num]</#0079FF><gray> <dark_gray>|</dark_gray> <#0079FF>/fpp rank list</#0079FF><gray>." rank-bot-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ ʙᴏᴛ ɴᴀᴍᴇᴅ <white>{name}<red>." rank-group-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ʟᴜᴄᴋᴘᴇʀᴍꜱ ɢʀᴏᴜᴘ <white>{group}<red> ᴅᴏᴇꜱ ɴᴏᴛ ᴇxɪꜱᴛ."
# ── Alert (cross-server broadcast) ──────────────────────────────────────────── # {message} — the alert text alert-received: "{prefix}<red><bold>ᴀʟᴇʀᴛ<reset> <dark_gray>» <white>{message}" alert-sent: "{prefix}<#66CC66>✓</#66CC66> <gray>ᴀʟᴇʀᴛ ʙʀᴏᴀᴅᴄᴀꜱᴛᴇᴅ ᴛᴏ <#0079FF>ᴀʟʟ ꜱᴇʀᴠᴇʀꜱ</#0079FF><gray>." alert-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp alert <message></#0079FF><gray>."
# ── Sync (config synchronization) ───────────────────────────────────────────── # {file} — config file name | {count} — number of files with local changes sync-not-available: "{prefix}<red>ᴄᴏɴꜰɪɢ ꜱʏɴᴄ ɪꜱ ɴᴏᴛ ᴀᴠᴀɪʟᴀʙʟᴇ <dark_gray>(ɴᴇᴛᴡᴏʀᴋ ᴍᴏᴅᴇ ᴏɴʟʏ<dark_gray>)<red>." sync-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp sync <push|pull|check|status> [file]</#0079FF><gray>." sync-push-success: "{prefix}<#66CC66>✓</#66CC66> <gray>ᴘᴜꜱʜᴇᴅ <#0079FF>{file}</#0079FF> <gray>ᴛᴏ ᴅᴀᴛᴀʙᴀꜱᴇ." sync-push-failed: "{prefix}<red>ꜰᴀɪʟᴇᴅ ᴛᴏ ᴘᴜꜱʜ <white>{file}<red> ᴛᴏ ᴅᴀᴛᴀʙᴀꜱᴇ." sync-push-all-success: "{prefix}<#66CC66>✓</#66CC66> <gray>ᴘᴜꜱʜᴇᴅ <#0079FF>ᴀʟʟ ᴄᴏɴꜰɪɡ ꜰɪʟᴇꜱ</#0079FF> <gray>ᴛᴏ ᴅᴀᴛᴀʙᴀꜱᴇ." sync-pull-success: "{prefix}<#66CC66>✓</#66CC66> <gray>ᴘᴜʟʟᴇᴅ <#0079FF>{file}</#0079FF> <gray>ꜰʀᴏᴍ ᴅᴀᴛᴀʙᴀꜱᴇ." sync-pull-failed: "{prefix}<red>ꜰᴀɪʟᴇᴅ ᴛᴏ ᴘᴜʟʟ <white>{file}<red> ꜰʀᴏᴍ ᴅᴀᴛᴀʙᴀꜱᴇ." sync-pull-all-success: "{prefix}<#66CC66>✓</#66CC66> <gray>ᴘᴜʟʟᴇᴅ <#0079FF>ᴀʟʟ ᴄᴏɴꜰɪɡ ꜰɪʟᴇꜱ</#0079FF> <gray>ꜰʀᴏᴍ ᴅᴀᴛᴀʙᴀꜱᴇ." sync-pull-no-updates: "{prefix}<gray>ᴀʟʟ ᴄᴏɴꜰɪɡ ꜰɪʟᴇꜱ ᴀʀᴇ ᴀʟʀᴇᴀᴅʏ ᴜᴘ ᴛᴏ ᴅᴀᴛᴇ." sync-pull-reload-hint: "{prefix}<gray>ʀᴜɴ <#0079FF>/fpp reload</#0079FF> <gray>ᴛᴏ ᴀᴘᴘʟʏ ᴛʜᴇ ᴄʜᴀɴɢᴇꜱ." sync-check-has-changes: "{prefix}<yellow>⚠<reset> <#0079FF>{file}</#0079FF> <gray>ʜᴀꜱ ʟᴏᴄᴀʟ ᴄʜᴀɴɢᴇꜱ <dark_gray>(ᴅɪꜰꜰᴇʀᴇɴᴛ ꜰʀᴏᴍ ᴅᴀᴛᴀʙᴀꜱᴇ<dark_gray>)." sync-check-no-changes: "{prefix}<#66CC66>✓</#66CC66> <#0079FF>{file}</#0079FF> <gray>ɪꜱ ᴜᴘ ᴛᴏ ᴅᴀᴛᴇ ᴡɪᴛʜ ᴅᴀᴛᴀʙᴀꜱᴇ." sync-check-all-clean: "{prefix}<#66CC66>✓</#66CC66> <gray>ᴀʟʟ ᴄᴏɴꜰɪɢ ꜰɪʟᴇꜱ ꜱʏɴᴄʜʀᴏɴɪᴢᴇᴅ ᴡɪᴛʜ ᴅᴀᴛᴀʙᴀꜱᴇ." sync-check-summary: "{prefix}<gray>ꜱʏɴᴄ ꜱᴛᴀᴛᴜꜱ: <#0079FF>{count}</#0079FF> <gray>ꜰɪʟᴇ(ꜱ) ᴡɪᴛʜ ʟᴏᴄᴀʟ ᴄʜᴀɴɢᴇꜱ." sync-status-no-network: "{prefix}<red>ꜱʏɴᴄ ɪꜱ ᴅɪꜱᴀʙʟᴇᴅ <dark_gray>(ɴᴏᴛ ɪɴ ɴᴇᴛᴡᴏʀᴋ ᴍᴏᴅᴇ<dark_gray>)<red>."
# ── Swap (session rotation) ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── # {sessions} — number of active session timers | {offline} — bots waiting to rejoin # {name} — bot name | {count} — bot count | {next} — time until next swap # {personality} — bot personality | {swaps} — swap count swap-enabled: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ꜱᴇꜱꜱɪᴏɴ ʀᴏᴛᴀᴛɪᴏɴ</#0079FF> <gray>ʜᴀꜱ ʙᴇᴇɴ <white>ᴇɴᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." swap-disabled: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ꜱᴇꜱꜱɪᴏɴ ʀᴏᴛᴀᴛɪᴏɴ</#0079FF> <gray>ʜᴀꜱ ʙᴇᴇɴ <white>ᴅɪꜱᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." swap-status-on: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ꜱᴇꜱꜱɪᴏɴ ʀᴏᴛᴀᴛɪᴏɴ</#0079FF> <gray>ɪꜱ <white>ᴇɴᴀʙʟᴇᴅ <dark_gray>│ <gray>ꜱᴇꜱꜱɪᴏɴꜱ: <#0079FF>{sessions}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>│ <gray>ᴏꜰꜰʟɪɴᴇ: <#0079FF>{offline}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>│ <gray>ɴᴇxᴛ: <#0079FF>{next}</#0079FF>" swap-status-off: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ꜱᴇꜱꜱɪᴏɴ ʀᴏᴛᴀᴛɪᴏɴ</#0079FF> <gray>ɪꜱ <white>ᴅɪꜱᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." swap-invalid: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp swap</#0079FF> <dark_gray>[<gray>ᴛᴏɢɢʟᴇ<dark_gray>]</dark_gray> <dark_gray>│</dark_gray> <#0079FF>/fpp swap <on|off|status|now <bot>|list></#0079FF><gray>." swap-now-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp swap now <bot></#0079FF><gray>." swap-not-available: "{prefix}<red>ꜱᴡᴀᴘ ꜱʏꜱᴛᴇᴍ ɴᴏᴛ ᴀᴠᴀɪʟᴀʙʟᴇ." swap-now-success: "{prefix}<#66CC66>✓</#66CC66> <#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ɪꜱ ɴᴏᴡ ʟᴇᴀᴠɪɴɢ<gray>." swap-now-failed: "{prefix}<red>ꜰᴀɪʟᴇᴅ ᴛᴏ ꜱᴡᴀᴘ ᴏᴜᴛ <white>{name}<red>." swap-list-empty: "{prefix}<gray>ɴᴏ ʙᴏᴛꜱ ᴄᴜʀʀᴇɴᴛʟʏ ꜱᴄʜᴇᴅᴜʟᴇᴅ ꜰᴏʀ ꜱᴡᴀᴘ." swap-list-header: "{prefix}<gray>ꜱᴄʜᴇᴅᴜʟᴇᴅ ʙᴏᴛꜱ<gray>: <#0079FF>{count}</#0079FF>" swap-list-entry: " <dark_gray>• <#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>│ <gray>{personality} <dark_gray>│ <gray>ᴄʏᴄʟᴇꜱ: <white>{swaps}"
# ── Peak Hours (time-based bot pool scheduling) ──────────────────────────────── # {window} — active time window label (e.g. 18:00–22:00) # {fraction} — current target fraction as a % (e.g. 75%) # {target} — target number of bots online # {sleeping} — bots currently sleeping in the peak-hours pool # {online} — AFK bots currently online # {swapping} — bots temporarily offline via BotSwapAI session rotation # {total} — total pool size (online + sleeping + swapping) # {time} — human-readable time until next window (e.g. 1h 20m) # {next_fraction} — fraction of the next window (e.g. 5%) peaks-enabled: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ᴘᴇᴀᴋ ʜᴏᴜʀꜱ</#0079FF> <gray>ᴇɴᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." peaks-disabled: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ᴘᴇᴀᴋ ʜᴏᴜʀꜱ</#0079FF> <gray>ᴅɪꜱᴀʙʟᴇᴅ — ᴀʟʟ ꜱʟᴇᴇᴘɪɴɢ ʙᴏᴛꜱ ᴡᴏᴋᴇɴ<gray>." peaks-status-on: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ᴘᴇᴀᴋ ʜᴏᴜʀꜱ</#0079FF> <dark_gray>│ <gray>ᴡɪɴᴅᴏᴡ: <white>{window} <dark_gray>│ <gray>ꜰʀᴀᴄᴛɪᴏɴ: <#0079FF>{fraction}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>│ <gray>ᴛᴀʀɢᴇᴛ: <#0079FF>{target}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>│ <gray>ᴏɴʟɪɴᴇ: <#0079FF>{online}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>│ <gray>ꜱᴡᴀᴘᴘɪɴɢ: <#0079FF>{swapping}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>│ <gray>ꜱʟᴇᴇᴘɪɴɢ: <#0079FF>{sleeping}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>│ <gray>ᴛᴏᴛᴀʟ: <#0079FF>{total}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>│ <gray>ᴛᴢ: <white>{timezone}" peaks-status-off: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ᴘᴇᴀᴋ ʜᴏᴜʀꜱ</#0079FF> <gray>ɪꜱ <white>ᴅɪꜱᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." peaks-next-window: "{prefix}<gray>ɴᴇxᴛ ᴡɪɴᴅᴏᴡ ɪɴ <#0079FF>{time}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>→ <#0079FF>{next_fraction}</#0079FF> <gray>ᴏꜰ ʙᴏᴛꜱ ᴡɪʟʟ ʙᴇ ᴏɴʟɪɴᴇ<gray>." peaks-no-windows: "{prefix}<gray>ɴᴏ ᴡɪɴᴅᴏᴡꜱ ᴄᴏɴꜰɪɢᴜʀᴇᴅ — ᴇᴅɪᴛ <white>peak-hours.schedule<gray> ɪɴ config.yml." peaks-requires-swap: "{prefix}<red>ᴘᴇᴀᴋ ʜᴏᴜʀꜱ ʀᴇQᴜɪʀᴇꜱ <white>swap.enabled: true<red>. ʀᴜɴ <white>/fpp swap on<red> ꜰɪʀꜱᴛ." peaks-invalid: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp peaks <on|off|status|next|force|list|wake|sleep></#0079FF><gray>." peaks-force-check: "{prefix}<gray>ᴘᴇᴀᴋ-ʜᴏᴜʀꜱ ᴇᴠᴀʟᴜᴀᴛɪᴏɴ ᴛʀɪɢɢᴇʀᴇᴅ." peaks-list-header: "{prefix}<gray>ꜱʟᴇᴇᴘɪɴɢ ʙᴏᴛꜱ <dark_gray>(<#0079FF>{count}</#0079FF>)<gray>:" peaks-list-entry: " <dark_gray>┃ <white>{name} <dark_gray>@ <gray>{world} <dark_gray>[<gray>{x}<dark_gray>, <gray>{y}<dark_gray>, <gray>{z}<dark_gray>]" peaks-list-empty: "{prefix}<gray>ɴᴏ ʙᴏᴛꜱ ᴀʀᴇ ᴄᴜʀʀᴇɴᴛʟʏ ꜱʟᴇᴇᴘɪɴɢ." peaks-wake-success: "{prefix}<gray>ᴡᴏᴋᴇ <white>{name}<gray>." peaks-wake-all: "{prefix}<gray>ᴡᴏᴋᴇ <#0079FF>{count}</#0079FF> ꜱʟᴇᴇᴘɪɴɢ ʙᴏᴛ(ꜱ)." peaks-sleep-success: "{prefix}<gray>ᴘᴜᴛ <white>{name}<gray> ᴛᴏ ꜱʟᴇᴇᴘ." peaks-sleep-failed: "{prefix}<red>ʙᴏᴛ '<white>{name}<red>' ɴᴏᴛ ꜰᴏᴜɴᴅ ᴏʀ ɴᴏᴛ ᴇʟɪɢɪʙʟᴇ." peaks-transition: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ᴘᴇᴀᴋ ᴡɪɴᴅᴏᴡ</#0079FF><gray>: <white>{window} <dark_gray>({fraction} <gray>ᴏꜰ ʙᴏᴛꜱ ᴏɴʟɪɴᴇ<dark_gray>)<gray>."
